_comment: Action names referenced from the bundle (panel flyout menus) that have no
actions: entry yet, and are NOT native intercepts — they are forward-declared
menu items for panels not yet fully implemented (gradient / opacity / swatches /
character). They currently no-op in every app. This is a MONOTONICALLY-DECREASING
debt list: check_action_refs.py fails if a NEW unresolved ref appears (that is
the real guard, e.g. it would have caught export_to_pdf), and also fails if a
listed action becomes resolved but is left here (implement it -> remove it here).
Do not add to this list to silence a genuinely broken reference.
